creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Erik Jensen from comment #4)

Nice work. Build options are respected.

A minor thing that I found but it seems to not mess with build is the use of USES+= pkgconfig that silences some warnings:

- -- Could NOT find PkgConfig (missing: PKG_CONFIG_EXECUTABLE)
+ -- Found PkgConfig: /usr/local/bin/pkgconf (found version "1.8.1")

Thanks
